title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.260 - Proceeds, how applied
text:
513.260.  Proceeds, how applied. — The money arising from such sale shall be applied to the payment of the judgment or decree under which it may have been made.
(RSMo 1939 § 1280) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1115; 1919 § 1566; 1909 § 2135
